creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text: The error messages indicate that clang++ was killed due to an out-of-memory condition.  This could be a result of a bug in LLVM itself (a memory leak perhaps), but without further clues it's hard to say.  Please feel free to re-open if you're able to trigger this on 12.1 or 12.2 and believe it's a bug.
